description: Standing cofounder-eye LLM-judgment leaf (PROTOTYPE): briefs itself to founder level, then judges where the system has grown MORE COMPLICATED than the value it delivers justifies — over-abstraction, redundant mechanisms (two ways to do one thing), speculative generality built for a future that may not arrive, and incidental complexity that slows every change. The inverse of the feature checks: not 'what's missing' but 'what should be cut or collapsed'. MILESTONE-AWARE: simplification is mostly ongoing hygiene, so findings bias toward advisory; only complexity actively causing correctness/velocity harm now gates. The harness gates relative to milestone.json's current rung.
